name: 9.6 – Gestion des offres de stage et matching IA

parameters.columns: entreprise, contact_email, intitule, formation_cible, competences, type_contrat, duree, description

parameters.query:
SELECT id, nom, prenom, email, formation, competences, recherche_stage
FROM etudiants
WHERE statut = 'actif'
  AND recherche_stage = TRUE
  AND formation = $1

parameters.jsCode:
const etudiants = $input.all().map(i => ({ id: i.json.id, prenom: i.json.prenom, nom: i.json.nom, email: i.json.email, competences: i.json.competences }));
return [{ json: { etudiants, nb: etudiants.length } }];
